name: enterprise-ai-workbench
description: Moyuan Desktop enterprise local AI workbench.

scripts.build:release: npm run build -w @eaw/codex-runtime && npm run build -w @eaw/desktop
scripts.dist:desktop:dir: npm run build:release && electron-builder --project apps/desktop --dir --publish never
scripts.dist:desktop:mac: npm run build:release && electron-builder --project apps/desktop --mac dmg zip --publish never
scripts.dist:desktop:win: npm run build:release && electron-builder --project apps/desktop --win nsis zip --publish never
